import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';
import 'package:provider/provider.dart';

import '__SCREEN_NAME___effect_state.dart';
import '__SCREEN_NAME___provider.dart';
import '__SCREEN_NAME___screen_state.dart';

class __ScreenName__Screen extends HookWidget {
  const __ScreenName__Screen({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final provider = context.watch<__ScreenName__Provider>();

    useEffect(() {
      final effect = provider.effect;
      if (effect is __ScreenName__ShowErrorEffect) {
        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
          SnackBar(content: Text(effect.message)),
        );
        provider.consumeEffect();
      }
      return null;
    }, [provider.effect]);

    final state = provider.state;

    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: const Text('__ScreenName__'),
      ),
      body: switch (state) {
        __ScreenName__InitialScreenState() => const SizedBox.shrink(),
        __ScreenName__LoadingScreenState() => const Center(
            child: CircularProgressIndicator(),
          ),
        __ScreenName__LoadedScreenState(:final title) => Center(
            child: Text(title),
          ),
        __ScreenName__ErrorScreenState(:final message) => Center(
            child: Text(message),
          ),
      },
      floatingActionButton: FloatingActionButton(
        onPressed: provider.load,
        child: const Icon(Icons.refresh),
      ),
    );
  }
}
